bench_setup.notes: Software PWM period measurement. PB8 (GPIO output) generates 1 kHz 50% square wave via TIM2 spin_us; PB9 (GPIO input) reads bench wire PB8→PB9. GPIOB_IDR polling detects rising edges; TIM2 free-running at 1 MHz timestamps them. Period accepted 900..1100 us (±10%). On FAIL: error_code bit0=ERR_CAP1, bit1=ERR_CAP2, bit2=ERR_PERIOD; detail0=measured period. On PASS detail0 starts at measured period (~1000) and increments each ms.

peripheral_signals.notes: GPIO output push-pull, software 1 kHz 50% duty wave. Wire: PB8 → PB9.
GPIO input floating, polled via GPIOB_IDR. Wire: PB8 → PB9.
